content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative self-improvement loop as the base structural framework for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of Self-Refine intentionally adopts a distinct inconsistent solving perspective drawn from work on LLM self-reflection, eliminating the need for external supervision entirely. This creates a hybrid system that leverages both the lightweight, training-free structure of Self-Refine and the error-detection power of inconsistent perspective reflection to catch blind spots single-perspective self-refinement misses.
